# Nourished Rebel

> Holistic nutrition coaching that helps you reclaim your health with real food, not rules.

## About

Nourished Rebel is a holistic nutrition and wellness coaching practice. We guide individuals away from diet culture, medical confusion, and restrictive eating toward a sustainable, intuitive relationship with food and their bodies. Our approach is evidence-informed, personalized, and grounded in real food as the foundation of health.

## Core Services

- **Nutrition Coaching Programs**: Personalized one-on-one and group coaching programs designed to help you heal your relationship with food, honor your body, and discover what truly nourishes you.
- **Discovery Calls**: Free introductory calls to discuss your health goals and determine if our approach is the right fit.
- **The Nourished Life Blog**: Articles, recipes, and wellness wisdom covering gut health, nutrition science, mindful eating, and holistic wellness.
- **Resources Library**: A curated collection of guides, meal plans, and educational content to support your wellness journey.

## Core Beliefs

- No diets, no extremes, no medicalized language
- Real food as the foundation of health
- Gut health as central to overall wellness
- Personalized approaches over one-size-fits-all solutions
- Self-trust and body wisdom over external rules
